series_metadata.series_description: Forms submitted to the Auditor of States office indicating updated contact information for recipients of Auditor of State mailings. Updated information may include: name, title, organization, date term expires, postal address, county, phone number, fax number, E-mail address and an option to receive future mailings via E-mail, postal mail or both.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: information is updated in computer database ; Electronic: superseded
